basics.name: Umasankari Suresh
basics.label: AI & Data Product Executive | Enterprise Platform Leader
basics.summary: Product executive with 15+ years building enterprise data and AI platforms that drive measurable business outcomes. Built EY’s IMPACT platform from 0-to-1, delivering $12M+ annual cloud savings and increasing platform adoption from <20% to 75%+. Known for translating complex, ambiguous data ecosystems into high-ROI product roadmaps with full strategy-to-execution traceability.

work.name: Ernst & Young LLP
work.position: Associate Director, Product & Data Strategy Leadership
highlights: Built the IMPACT platform from 0-to-1, unifying telemetry, cost, and adoption data into a single enterprise insights platform; increased adoption from <20% to 75%+.
Delivered $8M–$12M in annual cloud savings by establishing a comprehensive Azure FinOps framework and achieving 100% cost visibility across 20+ global teams.
Reduced reporting cycle time by 90% (14 days to <24 hours) through analytics modernization on Azure Data Lake and Power BI.
Avoided $2.7M in duplicative tooling costs by centralizing dashboards and enabling cross-service-line reuse.
Designed AI-native data ecosystem architecture using Zero-ETL patterns and MCP, reducing projected engineering overhead by 40%.
Improved customer retention by 30% through advanced funnel analysis and statistical modeling.
Authored the 'Journey to PI Planning' playbook, improving planning readiness by 30% across a 30+ person global PM/PO organization.
Established full strategy-to-execution traceability via Aha! → Azure DevOps hierarchy and built KPI ecosystem (SLTs/SLOs/SLAs).
Shifted executive alignment through Story-Led Demos emphasizing business value over technical updates.

roles.title: Senior Business Consulting Analyst & Functional Lead
highlights: Defined 2030 data technology roadmap and established Innovation CoE for Fortune 500 clients.
Restructured global data architecture, delivering BI solutions that reduced manual labor by 360+ hours.
Owned product roadmaps bridging legacy systems with future-state architectures.

roles.title: Senior Business Consultant & Application Delivery Lead
highlights: Introduced automated product roadmaps using Tableau and Power BI, reducing quarterly planning time by >10%.
Consolidated cross-functional data requirements and owned systems design for major initiatives.
Led and mentored analysts to improve information delivery efficiency.

roles.title: Enterprise Business Analyst Lead
highlights: Architected MDM frameworks for M&A data integration, increasing sales of acquired products.
Improved operational efficiency by 15% within two months across parallel programs.
Performed extensive data profiling and facilitated global data governance workshops.

roles.title: Technical Business Analyst & Project Lead
highlights: Launched a scalable POS system replacing legacy infrastructure, improving fulfillment and customer satisfaction.
Managed multi-year project execution with 100% traceability from requirements to implementation.
Modernized legacy processes and established best practices for installation order management.
